data.title: Elastic launches Elastic Inference Service (EIS) in Elastic Cloud, offers GPU-accelerated inference for Semantic search and generative AI, aiding search applications.
data.description: A company in San Francisco, Elastic (NYSE: ESTC), has introduced the Elastic Inference Service (EIS), which is a GPU-accelerated inference service. This service is specifically designed for Elasticsearch semantic search, vector search, and generative AI workflows. Elastic has integrated these capabilities into Elastic Cloud to support generative AI and vector search applications. By providing GPU acceleration for inference, Elastic aims to streamline operations as data volumes increase. This service eliminates the need for managing infrastructure, testing models, and managing integrations.

data.title: Share One and VisiFI merge to form Deda Sphere Inc., combining core and digital banking solutions. Approved by both boards, the merger took effect on October 1, 2025.
data.description: In Memphis, Tennessee, Share One and VisiFI, part of Dedagroup North America, have merged to form a new brand called Deda Sphere. Approved by both boards, the merger became official on October 1, 2025. This unified identity signifies the companies' common heritage and future goals. Deda Sphere leverages the collective experience of Share One and VisiFI, along with advanced digital innovation, to offer comprehensive core and digital banking solutions. This strategic move aims to enhance their services and further establish their presence in the market.

data.title: Budderfly's Virtual Power Plant platform named one of TIME's Best Inventions of 2025. Exciting recognition for innovation.
data.description: Budderfly, based in Shelton, Connecticut, shared exciting news today that its Virtual Power Plant (VPP) platform has earned recognition from TIME as one of the Best Inventions of 2025. This prestigious acknowledgment highlights the innovative nature of Budderfly's VPP platform, showcasing its cutting-edge technology and impact on the energy sector. The platform's selection among the Best Inventions of 2025 underscores its significance and relevance in the industry. This recognition by TIME further solidifies Budderfly's position as a leader in the energy innovation space.

data.title: Xsight Labs & Edgecore Networks launch world’s first 800G DPU PCIe add-in card for hyperscale AI, based in San Jose & Tel Aviv.
data.description: In a joint statement from San Jose, California and Tel Aviv, Israel, Xsight Labs and Edgecore Networks unveiled the launch of the pioneering 800G PCIe add-in card (AIC) tailored for hyperscale AI tasks.

data.title: Keysight launches UALink 1.0 transmitter test solution for UALink devices, enabling 200 Gb/s speed validation.
data.description: Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) revealed the introduction of the UALink 1.0 (Ultra Accelerator Link) transmitter test solution in Santa Rosa, California. The UALink 1.0 is a specialized compliance test tool created for UALink devices. With this newly launched test application, high-speed validation is achievable within cutting-edge computing and AI interconnect systems. It streamlines crucial electrical measurements to guarantee signal integrity and compliance with standards at 200 Gb/s link speeds. The UALink 1.0 technology made its debut in 2024.

data.title: Nextlink Internet boosts infrastructure with IP Infusion’s OcNOS software on Edgecore hardware, serving 11 states.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, IP Infusion, a prominent provider of open networking software solutions, revealed that Nextlink Internet, a rapidly expanding Internet Service Provider catering to rural America, has implemented IP Infusion’s OcNOS Service Provider and Data Center software on Edgecore hardware. Nextlink, based in Texas and operating in 11 states, has integrated this software into its middle-mile and data center infrastructure to enhance performance. This move signifies a strategic development in Nextlink's efforts to deliver high-speed internet services to underserved regions in America.

data.title: WHOOP MG wearable named to TIME's Best Inventions of 2025 list for pushing human potential with data, physiology, and AI.
data.description: A company based in Boston, WHOOP, known for its focus on human performance, revealed that its latest wearable technology, WHOOP MG, has been honored by TIME as one of the Best Inventions of 2025. This recognition showcases WHOOP's dedication to utilizing data, physiology, and artificial intelligence to enhance human capabilities. WHOOP MG marks a significant advancement in individual health, embodying a progressive approach towards well-being.

data.title: Brian Bendt promoted to Vice President of Network Services and Internet Planning & Development at Comporium in SC.
data.description: In Rock Hill, South Carolina, Comporium has announced the promotion of Brian Bendt to the Vice President of Network Services and Internet Planning & Development. Bendt will now be responsible for overseeing teams in charge of operating, maintaining, monitoring, and improving the systems that keep Comporium’s network functional for customers in all service regions. His leadership will be crucial for managing key departments such as Internet Planning and Development, Network Support Services, etc. This move showcases Comporium's commitment to enhancing its network services under Bendt's guidance.

data.title: Echelon, AI platform for IT services, exits stealth mode with $4.75 million funding led by Bain Capital Ventures.
data.description: A new AI platform, Echelon, specializing in automating enterprise IT processes, has recently come out of stealth mode in San Francisco. The platform revealed securing $4.75 million in seed funding, with Bain Capital Ventures leading the investment. Echelon's AI agents are capable of condensing ServiceNow implementations from taking months to just days. This innovation eliminates the reliance on offshore developers, traditionally associated with sluggish, costly, and sometimes unreliable enterprise IT deployments. Notable contributors to the funding round include prominent angels and executives.

data.title: TransMontaigne sold Miami terminal for $180M with 700,000 barrels capacity, now leasing it to continue operations.
data.description: In Denver, TransMontaigne Partners LLC disclosed the completion of the sale of its terminal on Fisher Island in Miami, Florida. The terminal has a storage capacity of about 700,000 barrels for marine fuels. The sale was finalized at $180 million. Following the sale, TransMontaigne entered into a lease agreement with the buyer to maintain operations for its current customer base.

data.title: DOGE may hit $0.31 resistance for 29% gain by Nov 2025. Technicals show gradual recovery from $0.24.
data.description: Analysts predict that Dogecoin (DOGE) could potentially reach a resistance point at $0.31 in the next four weeks. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) remains neutral while the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator shows bullish momentum, indicating a steady climb from its current value of $0.24. This signifies a positive outlook for DOGE as it gradually rebounds in the coming weeks.

data.title: Supreme Court rejects Coinbase's bid, preserving Californians' right to seek public relief in court. Oct 9, 2025.
data.description: In San Francisco on October 9, 2025, the U.S. Supreme Court decided not to review Coinbase's appeal of a significant ruling won by BraunHagey & Borden LLP (BHB) in the Kramer v. Coinbase case. This ruling upheld Californians' rights to bring forth claims.

IRS RAISES 2026 TAX BRACKETS AND DEDUCTIONS The IRS announced new 2026 federal income tax brackets. The top 37% rate will apply to income above $640,600 for individuals and $768,700 for joint filers. The standard deduction rises to $32,200 for couples and $16,100 for singles.

data.title: Merit Network expands eduroam in Detroit for Digital Inclusion Week, Oct 6-10, 2025, advancing education with safe Wi-Fi. #DigitalInclusion
data.description: Detroit residents can benefit from an expansion of eduroam, the secure Wi-Fi network designed for education and research, as part of a community initiative launched by Merit Network during Digital Inclusion Week from October 6-10, 2025. The initiative aims to provide access to this global network in the city. Funding supports this project, showcasing a commitment to digital inclusion.

data.title: goHappy has launched automatic language translations for text messages, enhancing inclusivity for employees.
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia on October 9, 2025, goHappy, a prominent company specializing in cutting-edge frontline engagement tools, unveiled a new feature. This feature automatically translates text messages into the preferred language of each employee. By doing so, it removes the necessity for HR, Operations, or other departments to manage this task manually. This innovative solution aims to enhance communication and inclusivity within teams.
